name: Aidan Jeon

dental_history.notes: Generally healthy dentition. Wisdom teeth partially erupted. Previous composite on #26 for incipient caries.

clinical_notes:
CLINICAL NOTES — Aidan Jeon (DOB: 1998-05-12)
Date: 2026-03-15  Provider: Dr. Patel
Chart #: AJ-2026-001

PATIENT HISTORY:
- Last visit: 2025-11-15 (routine cleaning, no issues)
- Previous composite restoration #26 (2023-09-22)
- No known allergies. Non-smoker.
- Partially erupted wisdom teeth noted since 2023.

CHIEF COMPLAINT: Dull ache lower right, intermittent over past 2 weeks.
Also requesting evaluation of wisdom teeth.

CLINICAL FINDINGS:
- Tooth #46: Occlusal-distal caries extending into dentin.
  Cold test positive (delayed response). Moderate depth.
  Recommend composite restoration (D2392).
- Tooth #18: Partially erupted, distal soft tissue impaction.
  Mild pericoronitis, erythematous tissue distal to crown.
  Recommend extraction (D7230).
- Tooth #38: Horizontally impacted against #37 distal root.
  Risk of resorption on #37. Refer to OMFS for surgical
  extraction (D7240).
- Tooth #26: Previous composite intact, no recurrent caries.
  Margins sealed, no intervention needed.
- Tooth #11: Mild enamel demineralization on facial surface.
  White spot lesion. Recommend fluoride varnish and monitoring.

PERIODONTAL ASSESSMENT:
- Probing depths 2-3mm throughout, within normal limits.
- No bleeding on probing. Adequate oral hygiene.
- Minimal calculus deposits lower anterior lingual.

TREATMENT PLAN:
1. [IMMEDIATE] Tooth #46 — Composite restoration (D2392)
2. [SOON] Tooth #18 — Simple extraction (D7230)
3. [SOON] Tooth #38 — Surgical extraction referral to OMFS (D7240)
4. [ROUTINE] Tooth #11 — Fluoride varnish application (D1206)

RADIOGRAPHIC NOTES:
Panoramic radiograph taken today. #38 horizontal impaction
confirmed. #46 radiolucency consistent with clinical findings.
No other pathology noted. Bone levels within normal limits.

NOTES: Patient informed of findings. Discussed extraction options
for wisdom teeth — patient prefers to address #18 first due to
symptoms, then schedule #38 OMFS referral. Consents to #46
restoration at next appointment. Fluoride varnish applied today.
Next visit: 2 weeks for #46 composite.
